steps.title: Generalize the pattern
steps.content: The SCCM supports young artists by connecting them with established mentors for training and guidance. The passage then says many other arts organizations offer similar support to new generations of artists.

steps.title: Keep the focus on mentees
steps.content: Choice A ranks training above guidance without support, Choice C shifts the benefit to mentors, and Choice D treats musicians as different from other artists. The pattern suggests that many organizations value mentorship for young artists. The answer is B.
